description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a REGISTRY variable set to registry.gitlab.com. Define a single stage named buildpush and a before_script that logs in to $REGISTRY with $CI_BUILD_USER and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN. Add a buildpush job in the buildpush stage that runs the exact commands: docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/checkmein2/checkmein2-campaign-service . , docker images --all , and docker push registry.gitlab.com/checkmein2/checkmein2-campaign-service. The job does not define any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
